TALKS IN HIGH TERMS


OF RICH WALLA WALLA

pages.raw_text:

Shipments are made to all points nv
Washington and Montana, while not
little goes further east.


The fruit growers are pretty well
organized and the meeting of the
Northwestern Fruit Growers associa-
ton, which will be held in Portland on
the 18th, 18th and 18th of January.
will be largely attended by growers
from Washington, Oregon. Idaho, Mon
tana and British Columbia. The com.
mission men Of the east always attend
these meetings, as do the railroad peo-
pie. Our grievances, il we have any,
are then laid before them and in this
way We secure better treatment and
siivece than we could in any other
way"


Mr.. Otfner is an authority on fruit
and fruit raising and is at present
studying hard how best to cope with
the apple pest which if not checked
will eventually ruin the apple orchards
of southeastern Washington.
